achievements.title: Hook and Thorn
achievements.description: Obtain the upper right extra life in the first part of Buttville level
achievements.author: DarknessZedzi

achievements.title: A Handful of Thorns
achievements.description: Obtain the upper left extra life in the first part of Buttville level
achievements.author: DarknessZedzi

achievements.title: Bonus at the End of Descent
achievements.description: Obtain the lower left extra life in the first part of Buttville level
achievements.author: DarknessZedzi

achievements.title: The Darkest Corner
achievements.description: Obtain the lower right extra life in the first part of Buttville level
achievements.author: DarknessZedzi

achievements.title: Hey, Here is Another One!
achievements.description: Obtain the secret extra life in the first part of Buttville level
achievements.author: DarknessZedzi

achievements.title: There is a Life on the Insectoid Planet
achievements.description: Obtain the first extra life in the second part of Buttville level
achievements.author: DarknessZedzi

achievements.title: Life in the Queen's Lair
achievements.description: Obtain the second extra life in the second part of Buttville level
achievements.author: DarknessZedzi

achievements.title: That Was Really Easy
achievements.description: Win the first race in Andy Asteroids level [LS=9A]
achievements.author: DarknessZedzi

achievements.title: What? This Race Again!?
achievements.description: Win the second race in Andy Asteroids level [LS=9B]
achievements.author: DarknessZedzi

achievements.title: I'm Beginning to Get Used to This Stuff
achievements.description: Win the third race in Andy Asteroids level [LS=9C]
achievements.author: DarknessZedzi

achievements.title: How Many More?!
achievements.description: Win the fourth race in Andy Asteroids level [LS=9D]
achievements.author: DarknessZedzi

achievements.title: Eat Dirt, Psy-Crow!
achievements.description: Win the fifth race in Andy Asteroids level [LS=9E]
achievements.author: DarknessZedzi

achievements.title: The Fastest Worm in History
achievements.description: Win the sixth race in Andy Asteroids level [LS=9F]
achievements.author: DarknessZedzi

achievements.title: The Final Run
achievements.description: Win the seventh race in Andy Asteroids level [LS=9G]
achievements.author: DarknessZedzi

achievements.title: A Nice Can of Worms
achievements.description: Win the race in Andy Asteroids and get at least 50 blue spheres
achievements.author: DarknessZedzi

achievements.title: Damn I'm Good
achievements.description: Win the race in Andy Asteroids and get 60 blue spheres
achievements.author: DarknessZedzi

achievements.title: Andy Would be Proud of Me
achievements.description: Win the race in Andy Asteroids without getting hit and without using shields and boosts
achievements.author: DarknessZedzi

achievements.title: Good Clean Run
achievements.description: Win the race in Andy Asteroids without taking anything
achievements.author: DarknessZedzi

achievements.title: Now I Feel Safe
achievements.description: Use the shield in Andy Asteroids
achievements.author: DarknessZedzi

achievements.title: Be Gone, Scavenger!
achievements.description: Defeat the Psy-Crow in the fight
achievements.author: DarknessZedzi

achievements.title: Ultimate Crow Killer
achievements.description: Defeat the Psy-Crow in the fight after losing the race in Andy Asteroids-7 [Difficult] [LS=9G]
achievements.author: DarknessZedzi

achievements.title: Now I Am Ready to Fight!
achievements.description: Collect 3000 gun bullets
achievements.author: DarknessZedzi

achievements.title: Now I Am Ready to Kill!
achievements.description: Collect 5000 gun bullets
achievements.author: DarknessZedzi

achievements.title: My First Plasma Blaster
achievements.description: Get first Mega Plasma Blaster
achievements.author: DarknessZedzi

achievements.title: Plasma King
achievements.description: Accumulate 9 blasts of Mega Plasma
achievements.author: DarknessZedzi

achievements.title: Hooks and Whips
achievements.description: Catch the hook 10 times using a whip (without touchdown)
achievements.author: DarknessZedzi

achievements.title: I'm Jimmy-Helicopter
achievements.description: Fly a second without interruption in helicopter mode
achievements.author: DarknessZedzi
